zh.Little Easton, Essex, England: 英國艾可蕾托 伊斯頓
zh.Markworth, Northumberland, England: 英國英格蘭諾圖波藍德
zh.Horsford, Norfolk, England: 英國諾福爾可霍斯福德
zh.lifeSummary: 當Sybil de Cheyne於大約1084年出生在英國諾福爾可霍斯福德時，她的父親Ralph de Caisneto Cheyne II17歲，母親Aeliz de Maminot10歲。她於大約1112年與Robert FitzWalter of Horsford在英國英格蘭諾圖波藍德結婚。他們至少是5個兒子的父母。她去世於1115年在英國賀福爾享年32歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sybil de Cheyne于大约1084年出生在英国諾福爾可霍斯福德时，她的父亲Ralph de Caisneto Cheyne II17岁，母亲Aeliz de Maminot10岁。她于大约1112年与Robert FitzWalter of Horsford在英国英格兰諾圖波藍德结婚。他们至少是5个儿子的父母。她去世于1115年在英国賀福爾享年32岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Cheyne
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English and Scottish (northeastern Scotland and Shetland): shortened form of   Chaney  , of Norman origin.

variants.name: Chaney
meanings: English (of Norman origin): habitational name from any one of several places in Normandy, Picardy, or Artois (France) named (Le) Quesnay or Quesnoy, or elsewhere in northern France named (Le or La) Chesnay or Chesnoy. The placenames all derive from Old French chesnai or its Normanno-Picard equivalent quesnai ‘oak grove’ (medieval Latin casnetum).
French: variant of Chanet, a habitational name from any of various places called Chanet or Le Chanet, from Latin canna ‘reed’ + the suffix -etum denoting an inhabitant.

nameMeanings.name: Sybil
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From the name (Greek Sibylla or Sybilla, with confusion over the vowels from an early period) of a class of ancient prophetesses inspired by Apollo. According to medieval theology, they were pagans denied the knowledge of Christ but blessed by God with some insight into things to come and accordingly admitted to heaven. It was thus regarded as a respectable name to be borne by Christians. This name was introduced to England by the Normans and enjoyed considerable popularity in the Middle Ages.

variants.name: Sybilla
meanings: From the name (Greek Sibylla or Sybilla, with confusion over the vowels from an early period) of a class of ancient prophetesses inspired by Apollo. According to medieval theology, they were pagans denied the knowledge of Christ but blessed by God with some insight into things to come and accordingly admitted to heaven. It was thus regarded as a respectable name to be borne by Christians. This name was introduced to England by the Normans and enjoyed considerable popularity in the Middle Ages.

historicEvents.title: Domesday Book
historicEvents.description: Domesday Book is Britain's earliest extant public record with information containing land surveys and landholdings commissioned by William I. The book was completed in 1086.

historicEvents.title: The Crusades
historicEvents.description: A series of religious wars between Christians and Muslims, known as the Crusades, occurred between 1096 and 1291, and played a large role in European Christian dominance in the Middle East.

historicEvents.title: The Battle of Tichebray
historicEvents.description: King Henry I defeated and captured his brother, Robert of Normandy, at the Battle of Tinchebray in 1106. Robert remained in captivity until his death in 1134.

en.lifeSummary: When Sybil de Cheyne was born about 1084, in Horsford, Norfolk, England, her father, Ralph de Caisneto Cheyne II, was 17 and her mother, Aeliz de Maminot, was 10. She married Robert FitzWalter of Horsford about 1112, in Northumberland, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 5 sons. She died in 1115, in Herefordshire, England, at the age of 32.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sybil de Cheyne est née environ 1084, à Horsford, Norfolk, Angleterre, son père, Ralph de Caisneto Cheyne II, avait 17 ans et sa mère, Aeliz de Maminot, avait 10 ans. Elle a épousé Robert FitzWalter of Horsford environ 1112, à Northumberland, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 5 fils. Elle est décédée en 1115, à Herefordshire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 32 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sybil de Cheyne um 1084 in Horsford, Norfolk, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Ralph de Caisneto Cheyne II 17 und ihre Mutter Aeliz de Maminot 10. Sie hat um 1112 in Northumberland, England, United Kingdom Robert FitzWalter of Horsford geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 5 Söhne. Sie starb 1115 im Alter von 32 Jahren in Herefordshire, England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sybil de Cheyne è nata il circa 1084 nel Horsford, Norfolk, England, sua padre, Ralph de Caisneto Cheyne II, aveva 17 anni e sua madre, Aeliz de Maminot, aveva 10 anni. Lei sposato Robert FitzWalter of Horsford circa 1112, nel Northumberland, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 5 figli. Morì nel 1115, nel Herefordshire, England, all'età di 32 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Sybil de Cheyneが約1084年にイギリスノーフォルクホールスフォードで生まれた時，父Ralph de Caisneto Cheyne IIは17歳，母Aeliz de Maminotは10歳であった。約1112年にイギリスイギリスノースウンバーランドでRobert FitzWalter of Horsfordと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも5人の息子の親であった。彼女は1115年にイギリスハーエフォードシュアイアで32歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Sybil de Cheyne(이)가 대략 1084년 영국 노르폴크 호르스퍼드에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Ralph de Caisneto Cheyne II(은)는 17세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Aeliz de Maminot(은)는 10세였다. 그녀는 대략 1112년 영국 잉글랜드 노르스벌랜드에서 Robert FitzWalter of Horsford(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 다섯 명의 아들을 두었다. 그녀는 1115년 영국 허퍼드실르에서 32세의 나이로 사망했다.

mn.Markworth, Northumberland, England: Norðhymbra land, Англи, Нэгдсэн Вант Улс

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sybil de Cheyne nasceu aproximadamente 1084, em Horsford, Norfolk, Inglaterra, seu pai, Ralph de Caisneto Cheyne II, tinha 17 anos e sua mãe, Aeliz de Maminot, tinha 10 anos. Ela casou-se com Robert FitzWalter of Horsford aproximadamente 1112, em Northumberland, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 5 filhos. Ela faleceu em 1115, em Herefordshire, Inglaterra, com 32 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sybil de Cheyne родилась около 1084 г. в местности хаурсфорд, норфолк, Англия, её отцу по имени Ralph de Caisneto Cheyne II было 17 лет, а матери, которую звали Aeliz de Maminot, 10. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Robert FitzWalter of Horsford около 1112 г. в местности нортумбирланд, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 5 сыновей. Она умерла в 1115 г. в местности хирефордшир, Англия в возрасте 32 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Sybil de Cheyne nació aproximadamente 1084, en Horsford, Norfolk, Inglaterra, su papá, Ralph de Caisneto Cheyne II, tenía 17 años y su mamá, Aeliz de Maminot, tenía 10 años. Se casó con Robert FitzWalter of Horsford aproximadamente 1112, en Northumberland, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 5 hijos. Murió en 1115, en Herefordshire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 32 años.
